Evidence / note: Yang describes a four-bed, ten-step PSA cycle in which equalization, purge provision, and backfill use gas from companion beds. This supports an explicit direct-pair schedule abstraction for the minimal implementation.

Evidence / note: The source Table 2 gives A/B/C/D operation labels and duration spans. Implementation should normalize the table into executable operation groups rather than infer pairings by row order.

Yang uses a non-isothermal dynamic model with mass, energy, and momentum balances and layered activated carbon/zeolite 5A beds; physical-model mismatch must be recorded separately from wrapper correctness.
